query:
ALTER TABLE sessions 
ADD COLUMN isVirtualMeeting BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN meetingLink VARCHAR(500),
ADD COLUMN meetingType ENUM('zoom', 'google_meet', 'teams', 'other');
